meta.label: 🇮🇹 Pre-exchange
meta.sub: MILANO → LAKE COMO → GENOVA → FIRENZE → BOLOGNA · 24 JUL – 1 AUG 2026
meta.intro: The city-hop week before the van: Milan landing, Como day trips, Genova, Florence and Bologna — then pick up the Alpine Loop in Venice on 1 Aug.

days.note: EK 353 + EK 205, land MXP 14:10. Check in at UNA Century, easy evening around Sempione.

plan.d: Milan's central park behind the castle — shake off the flight.
Napoleonic arch at the park's north gate; aperitivo bars around it.

days.note: Duomo first thing, then the Galleria and the famous schiacciata queue.

plan.d: Rooftop terraces are the move — book the early slot.
Florence's cult schiacciata — Milan outpost, queue moves fast.

days.note: Train Milano Centrale → Varenna (~1h). Ferry triangle: Varenna–Bellagio–Menaggio.

plan.d: Mid-lake ferry hop; swim at Varenna's lido if hot.

days.note: 06:05 Trenitalia from Rogoredo, in Genova by 08:38. Old town, port, focaccia.

plan.d: Europe's largest medieval old town; focaccia col formaggio for lunch.

days.note: Train to Florence, check in at Garibaldi Blu on Santa Maria Novella.

plan.d: Duomo exterior, Ponte Vecchio at golden hour.

days.note: Uffizi or Accademia (book ahead), Oltrarno evening.

plan.d: Pick one big museum; timed entry sells out in summer.

days.note: Note: Wanderlog has both Garibaldi Blu (night 3) and Hotel Internazionale Bologna booked tonight — resolve the overlap.

plan.d: Food-market lanes; tagliatelle al ragù where it was born.

days.note: Towers, Archiginnasio, last slow Italian city day before van life.
Train Bologna → Venezia, collect the Indie Campers van — the Alpine Loop trip takes over from here.

items.t: Passports + boarding passes offline
Travel insurance docs downloaded
Notify bank / enable overseas spending
eSIM for Italy/EU installed
Trenitalia tickets saved offline
VERIFY Emirates PNR for EK353/EK205 Jul 24 (no confirmation # in the tracker)
Check ETIAS status before flying — apply only if live by Jul 2026 (europa.eu travel info)
DOCS · Passports valid ≥6 months past Aug 29 (both travellers)
DOCS · International Driving Permit + physical licence (BOTH drivers, both vans)
DOCS · Offline copies of EVERY confirmation: flights, 6 hotels, 2 vans, campsites, lagoons
DOCS · Travel insurance covering glacier hikes + 3000m altitude + campervan excess
MONEY · EUR + CHF cash (some campsites/tolls cash-only); Iceland is card-only
MONEY · 2 cards (Visa + Mastercard) + bank travel notice
CLOTHES · Waterproof shell + rain pants (Alps AND Iceland)
CLOTHES · Fleece + thermal base layer (Jungfraujoch ~0°C, Iceland nights 5-8°C)
CLOTHES · Hiking boots (worn-in — Tre Cime + 2 glacier hikes) + trail socks
CLOTHES · Swimwear ×2 + quick-dry towels (lake swims + 4 Iceland lagoons)
CLOTHES · Beanie + gloves + sun hat + sunglasses
CLOTHES · One decent city outfit (Milan/Florence dinners)
TECH · EU adapter + SWISS type-J adapter (EU plugs don't all fit CH sockets)
TECH · Power bank + phone mounts + all cables
TECH · Offline maps: Google Maps areas + vedur.is + safetravel.is (Iceland)
TECH · eSIM covering EU + Switzerland + Iceland (CH often excluded from EU plans!)
HEALTH · Meds + first-aid kit + sunscreen (glacier glare) + motion-sickness tabs
VAN · Headlamps, earplugs + sleep mask, reusable bottles, laundry bag + detergent sheets
VAN · Packing cubes / soft duffels (hard shells don't stow in a campervan)

bookings_to_make.note: Rialto checks out Aug 19 but flight W6 to Reykjavík departs MILAN MXP Aug 20 09:00. Book Venezia S.Lucia → Milano Centrale.

bookings_to_make.what: ⚠️ GAP: Milan Malpensa hotel, night of Aug 19
bookings_to_make.note: 09:00 departure = be at MXP ~06:30. Sleep at an MXP airport hotel (e.g. Moxy/Sheraton MXP) or near Milano Centrale + 05:25 Malpensa Express.

bookings_to_make.book_by: NOW — book by 2026-07-15 (summer slots sell out)
bookings_to_make.note: Official site only (€4 booking fee) — avoid resellers.

bookings_to_make.what: Florence Duomo — Brunelleschi dome climb, Jul 29
bookings_to_make.book_by: NOW — book by 2026-07-14 (dome slots gone weeks ahead)
bookings_to_make.note: Brunelleschi Pass gives the dome + baptistery + museum; timed dome slot is mandatory. Cathedral floor itself is free.
Via Pisa. If doing Cinque Terre en route, get off at Monterosso/La Spezia — Cinque Terre Express is unreserved regional.
Frecciarossa 37min or regional 1h30 (regional needs no booking).

bookings_to_make.what: Train: Bologna → Venezia Mestre, Aug 1 AM (van pickup)
bookings_to_make.note: Indie Campers pickup (conf V43VXZ) — confirm pickup TIME + depot address, then pick a train that lands ≥1h before.
Official Duomo di Milano site — Culture Pass or rooftop-by-stairs ticket.
